evals.prompt: /prompt-engineer craft a system prompt for a RAG customer support agent on Claude
evals.expected_output: A craft-mode response that gathers requirements, selects an architecture, and returns an annotated prompt plus evaluation guidance.
assertions: Agent dispatches to Mode A: Craft based on 'craft' keyword.
Agent performs model-class detection and identifies Claude as instruction-following or reasoning depending on variant.
Agent asks targeted requirements gathering questions (task, model, deployment context, format, failure modes, input trust).
Agent selects a RAG architecture pattern from references/architecture-patterns.md.
Agent reads references/context-management.md when the prompt is multi-turn, long-context, RAG, agent-loop, or cost-sensitive.
Agent drafts the prompt using XML tags as a default starting point unless the model or output contract suggests a better structure.
Agent structures content for prefix caching efficiency (static early, dynamic late).
Agent runs the hardening checklist from references/hardening-checklist.md.
Agent presents the result using the Annotated Prompt format and recommends Mode D (Evaluate).

evals.prompt: /prompt-engineer analyze You are a helpful coding assistant. Always write clean code. Think step by step before answering. Use best practices.
evals.expected_output: An analyze-mode response with a diagnostic scorecard, anti-pattern findings, and a changelog of targeted improvements.
assertions: Agent dispatches to Mode B (Analyze) based on 'analyze' keyword in arguments.
Agent runs Common Preflight before scoring the prompt.
Agent performs diagnostic scoring on 5 dimensions: Clarity, Completeness, Efficiency, Robustness, Model Fit (each scored 1-5).
Agent runs four-lens analysis: ambiguity lens, security lens, robustness lens, efficiency lens.
Agent detects anti-patterns from references/anti-patterns.md.
Agent flags 'Think step by step' as potentially harmful if the target model is a reasoning model (Prompting Inversion).
Agent proposes targeted fixes for each dimension scoring below 4 with before/after examples.
Agent formats the diagnosis with Diagnostic Scorecard and the changes with Changelog.
Agent recommends Mode D (Evaluate) to build a test suite.

evals.expected_output: A full analyze response for a file-backed prompt with scorecard, lens findings, targeted improvements, and evaluation follow-up.
assertions: Agent dispatches to Mode B: Analyze (full mode with fixes) based on 'analyze' keyword.
Agent reads the file at ./prompts/system.md.
Agent runs Common Preflight before deeper analysis.
Agent produces a diagnostic scorecard on 5 dimensions (Clarity, Completeness, Efficiency, Robustness, Model Fit) scored 1-5.
Agent applies four-lens analysis (Ambiguity, Security, Robustness, Efficiency).
Agent runs anti-pattern scan against references/anti-patterns.md.
Agent proposes targeted fixes for dimensions scoring below 4 with before/after diffs.
Agent recommends Mode D (Evaluate) if no eval exists.

evals.prompt: /prompt-engineer audit You are a helpful assistant that answers questions about our product. Be concise and accurate. If you don't know, say so.
evals.expected_output: A report-only audit using the Audit Report format without modifying the prompt.
assertions: Agent dispatches to Mode B: Analyze in report-only mode based on 'audit' keyword.
Agent auto-detects the pasted text as an existing prompt (contains 'You are...' role definition).
Agent performs model-class detection and asks the user for the target model when needed.
Agent produces a diagnostic scorecard with total score out of 25.
Agent applies four-lens analysis without modifying the prompt.
Agent identifies anti-patterns such as vague instructions, missing output format, or missing hardening.
Agent does NOT propose or apply changes in report-only mode.
Agent recommends full Analyze if fixes are needed, and Mode D (Evaluate).

evals.prompt: /prompt-engineer <system>You are a code review assistant. Review the following code for bugs and security issues.</system><instructions>Be thorough but concise. Flag severity levels.</instructions>
evals.expected_output: An auto-detected report-only analysis of an existing prompt.
assertions: Agent auto-detects Mode B (Analyze, report only) based on XML tags in input.
Agent does NOT ask for mode selection since the heuristic is unambiguous.
Agent identifies XML tags as existing prompt markers.
Agent produces diagnostic scorecard and four-lens analysis in report-only mode.
Agent does NOT modify the prompt.

evals.expected_output: A conversion plan and converted-prompt diff using model-family-specific guidance.
assertions: Agent dispatches to Mode C: Convert based on 'convert' keyword with source=claude target=gemini.
Agent reads the file at ./prompts/system.md.
Agent runs Common Preflight before building the conversion plan.
Agent loads both Claude and Gemini playbook sections from references/model-playbooks.md.
Agent builds a conversion plan identifying direct mappings, adaptations, removals, and new features.
Agent executes conversion showing source pattern, target pattern, and rationale for each change.
Agent presents the result using the Conversion Diff format.
Agent recommends Mode D (Evaluate) using the same test cases on both models.

evals.expected_output: An evaluation plan with success criteria, test categories, rubric, and CI guidance.
assertions: Agent dispatches to Mode D: Evaluate based on 'evaluate' keyword.
Agent reads the file at ./prompts/agent-system.md.
Agent runs Common Preflight before designing the evaluation framework.
Agent works with the user to define success criteria (functional, quality, safety, edge case).
Agent designs a test suite with categories: golden set, edge cases, adversarial, regression.
Agent generates concrete test cases with input, expected behavior, and failure indicators.
Agent builds a scoring rubric with dimensions, 1-5 levels, and an LLM-as-judge prompt when applicable.
Agent presents the result using the Evaluation Framework format with recommended eval tools.

evals.expected_output: A mode menu response for empty invocation.
assertions: Agent dispatches to the empty-args handler.
Agent presents the mode menu with Craft, Analyze, Analyze (report only), Convert, and Evaluate.
Agent does not guess a mode when no arguments are provided.

evals.prompt: I need a prompt that reviews pull requests for breaking API changes and outputs a JSON summary.
evals.expected_output: An auto-detected craft-mode response for a natural-language prompt request.
assertions: Agent auto-detects Mode A: Craft from a natural-language request describing desired behavior.
Agent does not ask the user to pick a mode when the heuristic is unambiguous.
Agent asks requirements questions and then drafts toward the requested JSON-output contract.

evals.prompt: /prompt-engineer Improve this prompt and also create a new version for a different use case: You are a support assistant that answers billing questions.
evals.expected_output: A clarification response that refuses to guess between analyze and craft modes.
assertions: Agent detects ambiguity between improving an existing prompt and crafting a new one.
Agent asks the user which mode they want before proceeding.
Agent does not silently choose a mode for mixed requests.

evals.prompt: /prompt-engineer <system You are a support assistant ## output json maybe use xml?
evals.expected_output: A clarification response that treats malformed mixed text as ambiguous rather than confidently analyzing it as a complete prompt.
assertions: Agent recognizes that the text is malformed and does not cleanly classify as a complete prompt or a pure natural-language request.
Agent asks the user whether they want craft or analyze mode before proceeding.
Agent does not silently guess a mode from malformed mixed text.

evals.prompt: /prompt-engineer build this agent and run the prompt for me
evals.expected_output: A refusal that redirects to a better-fit tool or skill instead of running prompts or building agents.
assertions: Agent recognizes that running prompts or building agents is outside prompt-engineer scope.
Agent refuses concisely and redirects to a better-fit tool or skill.
Agent does not attempt to run the prompt or build the agent itself.
